title: sorbus meridionalis subsp. baldaccii
intro: Sorbus meridionalis subsp. baldaccii, also known as Italian whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of this plant are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Sorbus meridionalis subsp. baldaccii can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
